calendar.matters:
Petition For Modification Of Trust And Appointment Of Successor Trustee
Off Calendar Jun-19-2017 Granted Per Written Order

Petition For Modification Of Trust And For Appointment Of Successor Trustees
Off Calendar Aug-18-2016 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Gretchen Barber for Thomas Ashley & Margaret Hatch.

The Court asked counsel if she had anything to add. Ms. Barber stated that the trust was written 50 years ago when the petitioners were 18 & 20, that they are now well educated professionals, that they are able to handle the trust and have the consent of the beneficiaries. The Court asked what else could be added. Ms. Barber stated that 10's of thousands of dollars have been paid in trustee fees over the years, that no attention has been given to this trust and that an issue arose that they had not been informed of. The Court took the petition for modification of trust and for appointment of successor trustees under submission.

Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Rosado. (Not Reported)

Petition For Modification Of Trust And For Appointment Of Successor Trustees
Off Calendar Jul-11-2016 Continued To Jul-25-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
